createdNotice.title: API Key Created
createdNotice.copyHint: Please copy this Key now. You will not be able to view it again later.

keyList.empty: No API Keys yet. Create one above to connect your Agent.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm Delete
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this API Key? Agents using this Key will no longer be able to connect. This action cannot be undone.
